mapper.select: SELECT m.*, s.id as sender_user_id, s.name as sender_user_name, s.avatar as sender_user_avatar, r.id as receiver_user_id, r.name as receiver_user_name, r.avatar as receiver_user_avatar FROM message m LEFT JOIN `user` s ON m.sender_id = s.id LEFT JOIN `user` r ON m.receiver_id = r.id WHERE m.id = #{id}

SELECT m.*, s.id as sender_user_id, s.name as sender_user_name, s.avatar as sender_user_avatar, r.id as receiver_user_id, r.name as receiver_user_name, r.avatar as receiver_user_avatar FROM message m LEFT JOIN `user` s ON m.sender_id = s.id LEFT JOIN `user` r ON m.receiver_id = r.id WHERE m.session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY m.created_at ASC

SELECT m.*, s.id as sender_user_id, s.name as sender_user_name, s.avatar as sender_user_avatar, r.id as receiver_user_id, r.name as receiver_user_name, r.avatar as receiver_user_avatar FROM message m LEFT JOIN `user` s ON m.sender_id = s.id LEFT JOIN `user` r ON m.receiver_id = r.id WHERE m.id IN ( SELECT MAX(id) FROM message WHERE sender_id = #{userId} OR receiver_id = #{userId} GROUP BY session_id ) ORDER BY m.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO message (session_id, sender_id, receiver_id, content, is_read, created_at) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{content}, 0, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE message SET is_read = 1 WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND receiver_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM message WHERE receiver_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
